checkin.journal:
Grateful for: I am grateful that this week is finished, I am going home, I'm grateful for this experience, for having this, for just genuinely surviving, Cosita Family Friends ❤️❤️❤️, New day, hopefully getting better, My lymph nodes
Today great: Just a smooth ride travel back, some reflexion on what has happened, what has done well, and what has not worked. I think I need this resume. General, good flight, no delays, and getting back safe 
Affirmation: I am good and kind, and I want to believe
